lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਕੇ ਭੋਗਾ ਇਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਅੰਧ ਨ ਜਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rang sang bikhiaa ke bhogaa in sang andh na jaanee |1|
lines.english: He is immersed in the enjoyment of corrupt pleasures; engrossed in them, the blind fool does not understand. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸੰਚਉ ਹਉ ਖਾਟਤਾ ਸਗਲੀ ਅਵਧ ਬਿਹਾਨੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau sanchau hau khaattataa sagalee avadh bihaanee | rahaau |
lines.english: "I am earning profits, I am getting rich", he says, as his life passes away. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸੂਰਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ਹਉ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੁਝਹਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau sooraa paradhaan hau ko naahee mujheh samaanee |2|
lines.english: "I am a hero, I am famous and distinguished; no one is equal to me." ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਬਨਵੰਤ ਅਚਾਰ ਕੁਲੀਨਾ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਗੁਮਾਨੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jobanavant achaar kuleenaa man meh hoe gumaanee |3|
lines.english: "I am young, cultured, and born of a good family." In his mind, he is proud and arrogant like this. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਉਲਝਾਇਓ ਬਾਧ ਬੁਧਿ ਕਾ ਮਰਤਿਆ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਸਰਾਨੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jiau ulajhaaeo baadh budh kaa maratiaa nahee bisaraanee |4|
lines.english: He is trapped by his false intellect, and he does not forget this until he dies. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤ ਬੰਧਪ ਸਖੇ ਪਾਛੇ ਤਿਨਹੂ ਕਉ ਸੰਪਾਨੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bhaaee meet bandhap sakhe paachhe tinahoo kau sanpaanee |5|
lines.english: Brothers, friends, relatives and companions who live after him - he entrusts his wealth to them. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਗੋ ਮਨੁ ਬਾਸਨਾ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਨੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jit laago man baasanaa ant saaee pragattaanee |6|
lines.english: That desire, to which the mind is attached, at the last moment, becomes manifest. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਸੁਚਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਿ ਇਹ ਬੰਧਨ ਬੰਧਾਨੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh such karam kar ih bandhan bandhaanee |7|
lines.english: He may perform religious deeds, but his mind is egotistical, and he is bound by these bonds. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਨੀ ॥੮॥੩॥੧੫॥੪੪॥ ਜੁਮਲਾ
lines.translit: deaal purakh kirapaa karahu naanak daas dasaanee |8|3|15|44| jumalaa
lines.english: O Merciful Lord, please bless me Your Mercy, that Nanak may become the slave of Your slaves. ||8||3||15||44||Total||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree poorabee chhant mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Poorbee, Chhant, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਰੈਣਿ ਦੁਹੇਲੜੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mundh rain duhelarreea jeeo need na aavai |
lines.english: For the bride, the night is painful; sleep does not come.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਦੁਬਲੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan dubaleea jeeo pir kai haavai |
lines.english: The soul-bride has grown weak, in the pain of separation from her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਥੀਈ ਦੁਬਲਿ ਕੰਤ ਹਾਵੈ ਕੇਵ ਨੈਣੀ ਦੇਖਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhan theeee dubal kant haavai kev nainee dekhe |
lines.english: The soul-bride is wasting away, in the pain of separation from her Husband; how can she see Him with her eyes?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਗਾਰ ਮਿਠ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਜਨ ਸਭੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਲੇਖਏ ॥
lines.translit: seegaar mitth ras bhog bhojan sabh jhootth kitai na lekhe |
lines.english: Her decorations, sweet foods, sensuous pleasures and delicacies are all false; they are of no account at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮਤ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਗਾਲੀ ਦੁਧਾ ਥਣੀ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: mai mat joban garab gaalee dudhaa thanee na aave |
lines.english: Intoxicated with the wine of youthful pride, she has been ruined, and her breasts no longer yield milk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saa dhan milai milaaee bin pir need na aave |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the soul-bride meets her Husband Lord, when He causes her to meet Him; without Him, sleep does not come to her. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਨਿਮਾਨੜੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਧਨੀ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mundh nimaanarreea jeeo bin dhanee piaare |
lines.english: The bride is dishonored without her Beloved Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kiau sukh paavaigee bin ur dhaare |
lines.english: How can she find peace, without enshrining Him in her heart?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਹ ਬਿਨੁ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: naah bin ghar vaas naahee puchhahu sakhee saheleea |
lines.english: Without her Husband, her home is not worth living in; go and ask your sisters and companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਵਸਹਿ ਸਾਚਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin naam preet piaar naahee vaseh saach suheleea |
lines.english: Without Naam, the Name of the Lord, there is no love and affection; but with her True Lord, she abides in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na chhoddai saa dhan naam sehaj samaaneea |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride who does not abandon the Naam, is intuitively absorbed in the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਜਨ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਮੇਲਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਹੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach man sajan santokh melaa guramatee sahu jaaniaa |
lines.english: Through mental truth and contentment, union with the True Friend is attained; through the Guru's Teachings, the Husband Lord is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੜੀਹੋ ਹਮ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: mil sakhee sahelarreeho ham pir raavehaa |
lines.english: Come, O my sisters and companions - let's enjoy our Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੁਛਿ ਲਿਖਉਗੀ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਨੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur puchh likhaugee jeeo sabad sanehaa |
lines.english: I will ask the Guru, and write His Word as my love-note.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਮਨਮੁਖੀ ਪਛੁਤਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabad saachaa gur dikhaaeaa manamukhee pachhutaaneea |
lines.english: The Guru has shown me the True Word of the Shabad. The self-willed manmukhs will regret and repent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਸਿ ਜਾਤਉ ਰਹੈ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਜਾਮਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nikas jaatau rahai asathir jaam sach pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: My wandering mind became steady, when I recognized the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀਹੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree sehaj saachaa milahu sakhee saheleeho |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Glance of Grace of the True Lord, celestial peace is obtained; let's meet Him, O my sisters and companions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਨਉਤਨ ਸਬਦਿ ਨੇਹੁ ਨਵੇਲਓ ॥
lines.translit: saach kee mat sadaa nautan sabad nehu navelo |
lines.english: The Teachings of Truth are forever new; the love of the Shabad is forever fresh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਵਰੁ ਨਾਰੀ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mil var naaree mangal gaaeaa |
lines.english: At the Union of husband and wife, the songs of rejoicing were sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਇਛ ਪੁਨੀ ਜੀਉ ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: meree ichh punee jeeo ham ghar saajan aaeaa |
lines.english: My desire has been fulfilled - my Friend has come to my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਰਹਸੀ ਮੁੰਧ ਮਨਿ ਓਮਾਹਓ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaae mangal prem rahasee mundh man omaaho |
lines.english: Singing the songs of joyful praise and love to Him, the soul-bride's mind is thrilled and delighted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਰਹੰਸੇ ਦੁਸਟ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਜਪਿ ਸਚੁ ਲਾਹਓ ॥
lines.translit: saajan rahanse dusatt viaape saach jap sach laaho |
lines.english: My friends are happy, and my enemies are unhappy; meditating on the True Lord, the true profit is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਨਤੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਸਿ ਭਿੰਨੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar jorr saa dhan karai binatee rain din ras bhineea |
lines.english: With her palms pressed together, the soul-bride prays, that she may remain immersed in the Love of her Lord, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰੁ ਧਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਰਲੀਆ ਇਛ ਮੇਰੀ ਪੁੰਨੀਆ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak pir dhan kareh raleea ichh meree puneea |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Husband Lord and the soul-bride revel together; my desires are fulfilled. ||4||1||
